title: invitations — rollout flags
description: Rollout / change-management flags for THIS module. Distinct from `features.json` (empty — invitations substrate is always on). Every material change ships behind a flag per SOC 2 CC8.1.

flags.description: Turns off ALL send endpoints without a redeploy. Incident-response only — flipping off returns 503 to every POST /tenant/invitations. Existing pending invitations continue to accept normally.
SMS channel via Twilio. Off by default (mail-only). Enterprise plan enables via entitlement; other tenants can request per-tenant via ops-only setting.
Slack channel — Slack bot delivery. Enabled only for tenants with an active Slack integration.
48h-before-expiry reminder emails. On by default; kill-switch capability for deliverability incidents.
Per-tenant customisable email templates (subject line + body). Off in v1 (all tenants use platform templates); rolled out per tenant.
Enables invitation risk scoring (velocity checks, invitee blocklist matching, transient email pattern detection). Off in v1; canary bucket at first.
Emits alerts when acceptance_rate drops below SLO thresholds. On for observability from day 1.

retirement_policy.description: A flag lives at most 90 days after reaching 100% GA. After 90d, either the flag is deleted OR converts to a `kill-switch`. Prevents flag-registry sprawl.
